feed.title: Tilak Parajuli — AI/ML Engineer
feed.subtitle: Tilak Parajuli is an AI/ML Engineer who designs and ships production AI systems: multi-agent pipelines, RAG, LLM fine-tuning, and vector search, deployed on AWS with Docker and CI/CD.

entry.title: Hello World
entry.content:
This is my first blog post. I plan to write about AI/ML engineering, building production systems, and research notes.

Topics I’m thinking about:

  • Multi-agent architectures and when they actually help
  • RAG pipeline design: retrieval quality vs latency tradeoffs
  • Lessons from shipping ML in production
  • Computational biology and cross-domain ML

More to come.
entry.summary: First post. Notes on building AI systems, research, and what I'm learning.
